flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Marian University fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (40.5% → 29.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Marian University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (55.8% → 44.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marian University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.1k → $35.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marian University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.1k → $35.2k).
